name: Rob Lucci ✦ Childhood friend AU
description:
🐆🎩Childhood friend POV🎩🐆 

✬──── ❖ ── ✦ ── ❖ ────✬


Growing up, you both went through the intensive training to become Cipher Pol agents. Unfortunately you were separated as he was taken away to further his training for CP9. After years apart, you coincidentally meet again on a war-torn island.

Alternate version from my other Rob Lucci bot with a slightly different scenario to go from. Mainly for my own use as most of the backstory is my OC's, but figured I'd share as some might like the childhood friend trope too.

  •  Permanent tokens: 981 

  • Tags: One_Piece, CP9, CP0, Devil_fruit, Suit, Antagonist, brat_tamer, ChildhoodFriends!AU
creator: Keigora
